result.name: Improved STL Validator
result.description: Validates ASCII and binary STL files for manufacturing suitability, checking manifold integrity, face normals, degenerate triangles, duplicate faces, and non-manifold edges. Fixes bugs in the provided validator (binary STL support, correct normal threshold, degenerate/non-manifold detection).

manifest.name: STL Batch Validator
manifest.description: Validates ASCII and binary STL files for manufacturing: checks manifold integrity, inverted normals (fixed threshold bug), degenerate triangles, open/non-manifold edges. Supports batch processing.
